age.long_description: Age group, based on age in current years.

epic_n_diarrhea.short_description: Number of ED encounters with all-cause diarrhea diagnoses.
epic_n_diarrhea.long_description: Number of emergency department encounters with all-cause diarrhea ICD-10-CM codes (A00-A09, R19.7). Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_pct_diarrhea.short_description: Percentage of ED encounters attributable to all-cause diarrhea.
epic_pct_diarrhea.long_description: Percentage of emergency department encounters attributable to all-cause diarrhea ICD-10-CM codes (A00-A09, R19.7), calculated as the count divided by total all-cause ED encounters for the same geography, age, and time period.

epic_n_all_encounters_{variant}.short_description: Total number of {variant.short_name} emergency department encounters for any cause.
epic_n_all_encounters_{variant}.long_description: Total count of {variant.short_name} emergency department encounters for any cause, used as the denominator for the all-cause diarrhea percentage. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_diarrhea.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 all-cause diarrhea ED encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_diarrhea.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the diarrhea ED encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_diarrhea.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 all-cause diarrhea emergency department encounters in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_diarrhea) is imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_{var.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 all-cause {variant.short_name} ED encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_{var.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the all-cause {variant.short_name} ED encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_{var.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 all-cause {variant.short_name} emergency department encounters in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_all_encounters_{variant}) is imputed as 5.

epic_cosmos.name: Epic Cosmos
epic_cosmos.description: Epic Cosmos is a collaborative research platform containing de-identified patient data from over 300 million patients across more than 1,600 hospitals and health systems using Epic electronic health record systems. Data is accessed via SlicerDicer, a self-service analytics tool. The dataset includes emergency department visits, diagnoses, immunizations, laboratory results, and other clinical data. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed. Coverage extends across all U.S. states and territories. Note that county-level and city-level stratifications could differ markedly in total sample size due to high levels of missingness of county data in some states.
epic_cosmos.restrictions: The data can be re-used with appropriate attribution. A suggested citation relating to this data is 'Results of research performed with Epic Cosmos were obtained from the PopHIVE platform (https://github.com/PopHIVE/Ingest).'
